title: Roedean Festival Fringe Concert 2026
description: This festival concert is a highlight of the year with Roedean’s talented young musicians performing solos with orchestra. This year the programme features a stunning line up of music and will include movements from Elgar’s Cello Concerto, Sibelius’ Violin Concerto, Glière’s Harp Concerto, Rachmininov’s Piano Concerto No.2, Dvořák’s Song to the Moon, Massenet’s Va! laisse couler mes larmes and Waxman’s Carmen Fantasy. Roedean Choir will be joined by staff and musicians from our wider community to perform four beautiful and atmospheric choral works: Elgar The Snow, Ešenvalds Stars, Grieg Spring and Whitacre Cloudburst. This promises to be a truly uplifting event.
